Legionnaire Neverburn thanks you for your assistance.

Legionnaire Steelbane was furious after Smokestead, and he's decided that you're his scapegoat. He's already ordered you beaten and given you demeaning cub duty. If you can't prove your worth, you may never get back on his good side.

Lehn,I'm sorry, I really am. Words cannot excuse the pain I've dealt, but I hope they better explain why I've left.I never thought that I'd get to see the world...to travel. I thought that Cantha was it, that there was nothing else for me. But then...everything changed. Our world changed.I know you want to stay here, in Kaineng. You want to be with your family, but my mother might still be out there. Somewhere. Waiting for me to leave these borders and find her. So that's exactly what I'm going to do.I couldn't see the wedding through. Not with this burning urge to leave—to ride the ocean waves to wherever they may carry me.Lehn, I hope you find peace. And love. I hope you find everything that you want, and I'm sorry that it wasn't me.Aliseau
